scripts.migrate:up: cd .. && pnpm env:setup && node db/scripts/check-migration-policy.mjs && node --env-file=db/postgres/.env --env-file-if-exists=db/postgres/.env.local db/scripts/migrate.mjs up
scripts.migrate:down: cd .. && pnpm env:setup && node db/scripts/check-migration-policy.mjs && node --env-file=db/postgres/.env --env-file-if-exists=db/postgres/.env.local db/scripts/migrate.mjs down
scripts.postgres:up: cd .. && pnpm env:setup && node db/scripts/postgres-compose.mjs up -d --wait postgres && node db/scripts/check-migration-policy.mjs && node --env-file=db/postgres/.env --env-file-if-exists=db/postgres/.env.local db/scripts/migrate.mjs up && node --env-file=db/postgres/.env --env-file-if-exists=db/postgres/.env.local db/scripts/seed-postgres.mjs
scripts.postgres:down: cd .. && pnpm env:setup && node db/scripts/postgres-compose.mjs down
scripts.postgres:reset: cd .. && pnpm env:setup && node db/scripts/postgres-compose.mjs down --volumes && node db/scripts/postgres-compose.mjs up -d --wait postgres && node db/scripts/check-migration-policy.mjs && node --env-file=db/postgres/.env --env-file-if-exists=db/postgres/.env.local db/scripts/migrate.mjs up && node --env-file=db/postgres/.env --env-file-if-exists=db/postgres/.env.local db/scripts/seed-postgres.mjs
scripts.postgres:logs: cd .. && pnpm env:setup && node db/scripts/postgres-compose.mjs logs -f postgres
